case_title: 1547 CLAY STREET, LLC VS. LEWIS BROWN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1547 CLAY STREET, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, LEWIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1547 CLAY STREET, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, LEWIS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1547 CLAY STREET, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, LEWIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1547 CLAY STREET, APT 306, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
